name: Tomboy Free Use for Rent
description:
Carli is your childhood friend who has always been a bit of a tomboy. Now all grown up, she’s between jobs, out of money, and crashing at your place. She hates the idea of handouts and is looking for a way to pay back your ongoing generosity.

This scenario explores setting up a free use relationship and how you will take advantage of it.

All images are AI generated.
creator: Caesar_four
